demographics.audit_notes: Original values align closely with 1990 Decennial Census for Tract 205.08. Rent burden data is not available in this format from the 1990 census.
Values are interpolated between 1990 and 2000 census data. Population growth was likely non-linear due to Lakeline Mall opening in 1995, but provided value is plausible.

socioeconomic.audit_notes: Original values align with 1990 Census. Gini, uninsured, eviction, and SNAP data are not available at the tract level for this year.
Values are interpolated between 1990 and 2000 census data, reflecting strong economic growth during the 90s tech boom.
Original values align with 2000 Census. Gini, uninsured, eviction, and SNAP data are not available at the tract level for this year.
Values interpolated between 2000 and 2010. First year with available ACS data for new fields. Eviction rate is a regional estimate.
Original values align with ACS 2006-2010 data. Unemployment rate reflects the impact of the Great Recession. Eviction rate is a regional estimate.
Original values align with ACS 2011-2015 data. Eviction rate is a regional estimate.
Original values align with ACS 2016-2020 data. Eviction rate is a regional estimate and may be lower due to pandemic-era moratoriums.
Values are plausible extrapolations from recent ACS data. Eviction rate remains low due to lingering pandemic effects.
Values are plausible extrapolations from recent ACS data. Eviction rate begins to normalize post-moratoriums.
Values are projections based on recent trends. Slight uptick in unemployment reflects broader tech sector cooling.
Values are projections based on recent trends.
